controls.hardTokenLimitReason: codex-cli 0.144.5 does not expose a per-exec token cap; exact token usage is retained for every run
controls.rawEvents: temporary local files only; never committed

indexing.warm: built with the exact public package before the measured session in a separate treatment snapshot
indexing.none: no index exists at session start
indexing.cost: measured separately and never charged only to a query
indexing.sourceSnapshotIsolation: the agent sees a pristine read-only snapshot; the MCP server uses an equivalent treatment snapshot so .sanjaya never leaks to the native arm

scoring.citationRule: same repository-relative path and overlapping accepted line range
scoring.forbiddenClaimRule: only preregistered claim-key and rejected-value pairs are mechanically counted
scoring.proseLimitation: free-form prose is retained for review but is not semantically judged by a model
